name: ateoscraft-backend
description: AteosCraft backend — God-Level Production (persistent queue, backup, alerts, health, graceful shutdown)

scripts.backup: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {takeBackup,pruneOldBackups}=require('./utils/backup'); takeBackup('manual').then(p=>{ console.log('✅ Backup:', p); pruneOldBackups(); process.exit(0); }).catch(e=>{ console.error(e); process.exit(1); });"
